name: memory-lancedb-pro
description: OpenClaw enhanced long-term memory plugin with remote backend authority, local context orchestration, and management tools
author: win4r

scripts.test: node --test --test-name-pattern='.' test/backend-client-retry-idempotency.test.mjs test/config-session-strategy-migration.test.mjs test/jsonl-distill-slash-filter.test.mjs test/memory-reflection.test.mjs test/query-expander.test.mjs test/remote-backend-shell-integration.test.mjs test/self-improvement.test.mjs test/session-recovery-paths.test.mjs
